oxford.name: University of Oxford
oxford.overview: Oxford's Department of Biology (formerly Zoology + Plant Sciences) and Department of Earth Sciences are top-3 globally. Strong tradition in evolutionary biology (Dawkins, Hamilton), tropical ecology and palaeobiology.

accommodation.description: Most colleges guarantee accommodation for all years.

cityLife.description: Compact, historic city; close to Wytham Woods ecology research site.

keyFacts: Wytham Woods — UK's most-studied research forest
Dept of Earth Sciences is world-leading

cambridge.name: University of Cambridge
cambridge.overview: Cambridge Natural Sciences offers Biology, Plant Sciences, Earth Sciences and Zoology specialisms in Years 2–3. Home of Darwin, Watson & Crick (DNA), and the Sedgwick Museum (UK's oldest geology museum).

accommodation.description: College accommodation guaranteed for all undergraduate years.

cityLife.description: Compact, beautiful; major UK bioscience cluster on doorstep.

keyFacts: Birthplace of modern biology (Darwin, Watson, Crick)
Sedgwick Museum is UK's oldest geology museum

imperial-college-london.name: Imperial College London
imperial-college-london.overview: Imperial's Department of Life Sciences (Silwood Park ecology campus) and Department of Earth Science & Engineering are world-leading. Strong programmes in biotechnology, ecology, planetary science and resource geology.

cityLife.description: South Kensington with museums; Silwood Park rural campus from Year 2.

keyFacts: Silwood Park — UK's leading ecology research campus

university-college-london.name: University College London
university-college-london.overview: UCL's Department of Earth Sciences and Department of Genetics, Evolution and Environment are world-leading. Partnerships with the Natural History Museum across the road.

cityLife.description: Bloomsbury — opposite British Museum and Natural History Museum.

edinburgh.name: University of Edinburgh
edinburgh.overview: Edinburgh's School of Biological Sciences and School of GeoSciences are top-rated in the UK. The Roslin Institute (next door) is world-famous for Dolly the Sheep and molecular biology research.

cityLife.description: Beautiful Scottish capital; Highland access for fieldwork.

manchester.name: University of Manchester
manchester.overview: Manchester's Faculty of Biology, Medicine and Health is one of UK's largest, with strong programmes in biology, biotech and plant sciences. SEAES (School of Earth and Environmental Sciences) covers geology and atmospheric science.

cityLife.description: Vibrant city, Peak District 30 min away for field work.

keyFacts: SEAES School of Earth and Environmental Sciences

bristol.name: University of Bristol
bristol.overview: Bristol's School of Biological Sciences is renowned for evolutionary biology and behavioural ecology. School of Earth Sciences has world-leading volcanology research.

cityLife.description: Creative, sustainable city; close to Mendip Hills and Bristol Channel.

durham.name: University of Durham
durham.overview: Durham's Department of Biosciences and Department of Earth Sciences are highly research-active. Durham Geography is consistently UK's #1-ranked geography department.

cityLife.description: Beautiful UNESCO city; access to Pennines and North Sea coast.

warwick.name: University of Warwick
warwick.overview: Warwick's School of Life Sciences offers Biology and Biotechnology with strong industry-led teaching. WISB (Warwick Integrative Synthetic Biology) is a UKRI-funded research hub.

cityLife.description: Self-contained campus between Coventry and Leamington Spa.

sheffield.name: University of Sheffield
sheffield.overview: Sheffield's School of Biosciences is a UK leader in ecology and conservation biology. P3 Centre (Plants, Photosynthesis and Soil) is a UKRI-funded research hub.

cityLife.description: Friendly, affordable, Peak District 15 min away.

leeds.name: University of Leeds
leeds.overview: Leeds Faculty of Biological Sciences and School of Earth and Environment are both research-active. Strong British Geological Survey partnership in Earth Sciences.

cityLife.description: Northern financial capital, Yorkshire Dales nearby.

york.name: University of York
york.overview: York's Department of Biology has the Athena SWAN Gold award (gender equality) and strong ecology research. Stockholm Environment Institute York office is a global sustainability research hub.

accommodation.description: Halls in college on Heslington campus.

cityLife.description: Historic Roman city — affordable and beautiful.

glasgow.name: University of Glasgow
glasgow.overview: Glasgow's School of Life Sciences and School of Geographical & Earth Sciences are research-active. Access to SCENE field station on Loch Lomond for ecology work.

cityLife.description: Affordable city with vibrant music scene; Loch Lomond field site.

keyFacts: SCENE field station on Loch Lomond

st-andrews.name: University of St Andrews
st-andrews.overview: St Andrews School of Biology hosts the Sea Mammal Research Unit and Scottish Oceans Institute. School of Earth and Environmental Sciences is renowned for stable isotope geochemistry.

cityLife.description: Beautiful coastal town — home of golf, stunning beaches.

exeter.name: University of Exeter
exeter.overview: Exeter has the Penryn Cornwall campus (UK's best for environmental sciences) with the Centre for Ecology and Conservation and the Camborne School of Mines (geology).

cityLife.description: Cathedral city with access to Devon coast; Penryn campus in Cornwall.

southampton.name: University of Southampton
southampton.overview: Southampton hosts the National Oceanography Centre Southampton — UK's largest oceanographic research institution. Strong marine biology and ocean sciences programmes.

cityLife.description: Port city with New Forest access; on Solent waterway.

keyFacts: RRS Discovery ocean research vessel access

newcastle.name: Newcastle University
newcastle.overview: Newcastle's School of Natural and Environmental Sciences includes the Dove Marine Laboratory on the Northumberland coast — a 100-year-old marine field station.

accommodation.description: Halls in central Newcastle and Jesmond.

cityLife.description: Friendly North East city, Northumberland coast nearby.

liverpool.name: University of Liverpool
liverpool.overview: Liverpool's School of Life Sciences and Department of Earth, Ocean and Ecological Sciences are research-active. Isle of Man Marine Field Station for marine biology students.

cityLife.description: Vibrant city; close to North Wales coast.

keyFacts: Isle of Man Marine Field Station
Strong dept of Earth, Ocean and Ecological Sciences

nottingham.name: University of Nottingham
nottingham.overview: Nottingham's School of Biosciences (based at Sutton Bonington agricultural campus) is UK leader in plant science and biotechnology research.

cityLife.description: Friendly East Midlands city with Sutton Bonington rural campus.

birmingham.name: University of Birmingham
birmingham.overview: Birmingham's School of Biosciences and School of Geography, Earth and Environmental Sciences are research-active with strong NERC-funded climate work.

cityLife.description: UK's second city; one of Europe's youngest populations.

keyFacts: School of GEES (Geography, Earth and Environmental Sciences)

cardiff.name: Cardiff University
cardiff.overview: Cardiff's School of Earth and Environmental Sciences and School of Biosciences are research-active. Strong Pembrokeshire and Snowdonia field-work programme.

cityLife.description: Affordable Welsh capital; close to Brecon Beacons.

kings-college-london.name: King's College London
kings-college-london.overview: King's Department of Geography is one of UK's top-5; central London location next to the Thames.

cityLife.description: Strand campus opposite Somerset House — heart of central London.

london-school-of-economics.name: London School of Economics
london-school-of-economics.overview: LSE's Department of Geography and Environment is uniquely strong in human geography, environmental economics and urban studies — distinctively LSE in approach.

cityLife.description: Aldwych — between Strand and Holborn; heart of legal and policy London.

keyFacts: Russell Group; top global social science school

east-anglia.name: University of East Anglia
east-anglia.overview: UEA hosts the Tyndall Centre for Climate Change Research and the Climatic Research Unit — UK's leading climate science institution.

cityLife.description: Beautiful Norwich; Norfolk Broads ecology nearby.

lancaster.name: Lancaster University
lancaster.overview: Lancaster Environment Centre is one of UK's largest environmental science research clusters, with strong UK Centre for Ecology and Hydrology (UKCEH) partnership.

cityLife.description: Compact campus close to Lake District for fieldwork.

bangor.name: Bangor University
bangor.overview: Bangor's School of Ocean Sciences is one of UK's largest marine biology schools, on the Menai Strait. Strong forestry, conservation and marine biology programmes.

cityLife.description: Coastal town on the Menai Strait; Snowdonia (Eryri) on doorstep.

keyFacts: School of Ocean Sciences — major marine biology hub

plymouth.name: University of Plymouth
plymouth.overview: Plymouth has the UK's largest Marine Biology cohort and the renowned School of Biological & Marine Sciences. Strong partnerships with the National Marine Aquarium.

cityLife.description: South Devon coast — perfect for marine fieldwork.

reading.name: University of Reading
reading.overview: Reading has UK's leading School of Agriculture, Policy and Development plus strong Biological Sciences and Meteorology departments. Close ties to the Met Office and Rothamsted Research.

cityLife.description: Compact town; 30 min by train to central London.

stirling.name: University of Stirling
stirling.overview: Stirling is UK's only campus university with a loch on site. Strong freshwater ecology, aquaculture and environmental science programmes.

accommodation.description: Modern halls on parkland campus with loch.

cityLife.description: Beautiful campus with on-site loch and Wallace Monument views.

keyFacts: UK's only campus with on-site loch

aberdeen.name: University of Aberdeen
aberdeen.overview: Aberdeen has strong biological sciences (Rowett Institute for nutrition) and geosciences (oil and gas heritage). Forestry programme uses Cairngorms field areas.

cityLife.description: Granite City — oil capital of Europe; Cairngorms field access.

aberystwyth.name: Aberystwyth University
aberystwyth.overview: Aberystwyth's IBERS (Institute of Biological, Environmental and Rural Sciences) is a major BBSRC-funded research centre with strong agriculture, plant sciences and ecology programmes.

cityLife.description: Stunning coastal Welsh town with small, friendly community.

swansea.name: Swansea University
swansea.overview: Swansea's Department of Biosciences offers strong marine biology with Gower Peninsula field sites. Singleton campus is on Swansea Bay beach.

cityLife.description: Welsh coastal city; Gower Peninsula AONB on doorstep.

heriot-watt.name: Heriot-Watt University
heriot-watt.overview: Heriot-Watt's Orkney campus hosts the International Centre for Island Technology with strong marine biology and renewable energy research.

cityLife.description: Self-contained parkland campus near Edinburgh.

surrey.name: University of Surrey
surrey.overview: Surrey has strong biotechnology programmes with the renowned Professional Training Year placement scheme. Close to London (35 min by train).

cityLife.description: Guildford — affluent Surrey town; 35 min to central London.

harper-adams.name: Harper Adams University
harper-adams.overview: Harper Adams is UK's leading agricultural and rural-sciences specialist university, with a 600-hectare working farm. Strong countryside management, agriculture and rural environment programmes.

cityLife.description: Rural Shropshire countryside campus with working farm.

cumbria.name: University of Cumbria
cumbria.overview: Cumbria's Ambleside campus is at the heart of the Lake District — UK's best location for forestry, conservation and outdoor environmental sciences.

accommodation.description: Halls in Ambleside (Lake District) or Carlisle.

cityLife.description: Lake District National Park location.

keyFacts: Lake District field areas on doorstep
